div1.entryFree:
Grained, 1) showing the grain of the wood, rough, furrowed, not smooth: his g. bat, Compl. 64. my g. ash, Cor. IV, 5, 114. Hence: this g. face of mine, Err. V, 311.
2) being in grain, dyed in grain: such black and g. spots as will not leave their tinct, Hml. III, 4, 90 (Qq grieved).
